name: @aily-project/lib-sparkfun-microview
author: SparkFun
description: SparkFun MicroView Arduino + OLED 一体模块 Blockly 库，支持文字和图形绘制（使用全局 uView 对象）。

description_en: Blockly wrapper for the SparkFun MicroView standalone Arduino+OLED module.
